Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 4, 161 [eclipse instructions][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

šum-ma AN.GE₆ d30 ana IGI-ka TA U₄ 27-⸢KAM⸣

(o 1) If an eclipse of the Moon is in front of you, from the 27th day to the 14th day of the month of your watch, the planet that is with it (when) the eclipse of the Moon is displayed: that (planet) has caused the eclipse of the Moon to be displayed.

o 22

EN U₄ 14-KAM ša₂ ITI EN.NUN-ka dUDU.IDIM

o 33

ša <<AN>> KI-šu₂ AN.GE₆ d30 GARnu šu-u₂ AN.GE₆

o 44

d30 ul-taš-kin ⸢UGU?⸣ x-MEŠ ši-ma-a-x [...]

(o 4) On the ... [...] 6 months ... 4 days, 4 months. Those 5 planets - its sign is given to the land.

o 55

6 ITI-MEŠ x x x x-u₂ 4? U₄ 4 ITI-MEŠ

o 66

5? ⸢dUDU.IDIM šu?⸣-a-tu₂ ⸢it-ta⸣-šu₂ ana KUR SUM⸢in⸣

(rest of obverse missing)
Reverse
r 1r 1

šum-ma AN.GE₆ dUTU ana IGI-ka dUDU.[IDIM]

(r 1) If an eclipse of the Sun is in front of you, the planet that (in) the month of your watch, the Sun from <the 1st day> until the 28th day, the Moon passes by with it: that (planet) has caused the eclipse of the Sun to be displayed.

r 22

ša₂ ITI EN.NUN-ka dUTU TA <U₄ 1-KAM> EN U₄ 28-[KAM]

r 33

d30 KI-šu₂ DIBqu šu-u₂ AN.GE₆ dUTU

r 44

ul-taš-kin dUDU.IDIM šu-a-tu₂ re-eš

(r 4) That planet, the start of the beginning - its sign ... to the land.

r 55

šu-ri-i it-ta-šu₂ a-na KUR RAD x

r 66

u₄-mu ana LUGAL GANBA SIG₅ šu-qa u šup-[la]

(r 6) (On that) day business will prosper for the king. You keep seeking the maximum and minimum latitudes of the Moon and for 1 hundred days its sign is given for business.

r 77

ša₂ d30 KIN.KIN-ma a-di 1 ME u₄-mu

r 88

it-ta-šu₂ ana GANBA SUMin

(colophon)
r 99

TA UGU gišDA ZI

(r 9) Excerpted from a wooden writing board.
